title: Pomegranate Noir Luxury Pampering Gift Set, Bath and Body Collection, 26 x 13 x 6 cm
features: LUXURY GIFT SET: Beautiful pampering collection featuring Pomegranate Noir fragranced bath and body products in an elegant presentation box with ribbon
COMPLETE COLLECTION: Includes hand cream, bubble bath, and additional bath/body care items for a full self-care experience
ELEGANT DESIGN: Delicate purple floral pattern adorns the gift box with gold accents and white ribbon for sophisticated presentation
PERFECT SIZE: Compact yet substantial gift set measuring 26 cm wide, 13 cm high, and 6 cm deep for convenient storage and display
INDULGENT FRAGRANCE: Luxurious Pomegranate Noir scent throughout the collection for a coordinated bathing and moisturising experience
description: Product description Indulge in pure luxury with this exquisite Pomegranate Noir Pampering Set from Relax & Unwind. This beautifully presented gift set, measuring 26 x 13 x 6 cm, comes elegantly packaged in a delicate floral-patterned box with a sophisticated white ribbon accent. The collection features a carefully curated selection of bath and body essentials, including a soothing hand cream, luxurious bubble bath, and other pampering treats, all infused with the sophisticated aroma of Pomegranate Noir. The set's lavender and white colour scheme creates a sense of tranquility, perfect for creating a spa-like experience at home. Each product in this collection has been thoughtfully designed to provide a complete self-care ritual. The convenient size makes it an ideal gift choice for special occasions or as a delightful self-indulgence. Transform your daily bathing routine into a moment of pure relaxation with this premium pampering collection. Safety Warning Avoid Eye Contact
